title: selaginella hansenii
intro: Selaginella hansenii, also known as the "Polynesian Cliff Brake," is a species of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginella genus, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella hansenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Selaginella hansenii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its leaves can be dried and used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
